UNVEILING OUR HIRING PROCESS
Direct Engagement with Prospective Talent

As our company continues to grow, we find ourselves connecting with incredible individuals like you who are eager to contribute to our success story.

We want to shed light on our hiring process and clarify a crucial aspect – we do not recruit employees via third-parties or recruiters. We will not send direct messages to prospective team members via Facebook, text message/SMS, WhatsApp, Signal, Instagram, TikTok, SnapChat, etc. We have never and we will never post job postings or job ads on Facebook. We will not ask for banking details or for you to send payment. If you see that happening, you may be the victim of a scam. You can find links to our official Social Media accounts at the bottom of our website, manifolddatamining.com We are primarily active on our LinkedIn account.

If you think you are in contact with a Manifold team member, make sure you are receiving emails from an address linked to our website, so it should read something like “@manifolddatamining.com”.

With Great Data Comes a Great Team
Meet Our Team
HOW YOU CAN CONNECT WITH US
